title: bromus sterilis var. scaberrimus
intro: Bromus sterilis var. scaberrimus, also known as rough brome or scabrous brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health issues. The seeds of Bromus sterilis var. scaberrimus contain saponins and other compounds that have been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, such as diarrhea and indigestion, as well as to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues like bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
